narrative:
Barlow (precinct in Washington County) has 1,252 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
